message:
feat(fnp-python): native isin via UFuncArray::isin

Port np.isin out of the passthrough pool for matched-dtype real numeric
inputs with assume_unique=false and kind=None. Falls back to np.isin
for complex / integer-sidecar / mixed-dtype inputs, and for
assume_unique=true and kind="sort"/"table" back-ends so their tuned
semantics match numpy exactly.

br-franken_numpy-hswb
